blog_title: Polyester vs Cotton T-Shirt in Rain — ₹80K Stock Loss & Monsoon Storage Mistake for Bulk Printers
caption:
₹80,000 stock destroyed in 3 days. Here's what happened 😬

A printing business stored 1000 cotton tees next to polyester during monsoon. Water leaked. Polyester stayed dry — cotton got fungus in 72 hours. Cotton absorbs moisture. Bacteria thrives without airflow.

Polyester? Fine. Cotton on raised platforms with silica gel? Also fine.

That loss was completely avoidable. Save this if you're stocking for monsoon 👇
